variables.ts

view source

Declarations
#

415 declarations

absolute_color_variables
#

variables.ts view source

{ name: string; light?: string | undefined; dark?: string | undefined; summary?: string | undefined; }[] import {absolute_color_variables} from '@fuzdev/fuz_css/variables.js';

Absolute color variants for all hues and intensities. Non-adaptive: these don't change between light and dark color schemes.

default_variables
#

variables.ts view source

{ name: string; light?: string | undefined; dark?: string | undefined; summary?: string | undefined; }[] import {default_variables} from '@fuzdev/fuz_css/variables.js';

These are implicitly the variables for the base theme. See also the empty variables array of the base theme above.
